keywords: Dropbox file storage sync cloud backup sharing collaboration
description: Cloud file storage and sync service with cross-device consistency
patterns: Chunked upload with deduplication via content-hash (SHA-256)
S3 for block storage; metadata in MySQL/PostgreSQL
Delta sync — only changed blocks transferred
Long-polling or WebSocket for client sync notifications
Vector clocks or last-write-wins for conflict resolution
CDN edge caching for frequently accessed files
Background worker queue for thumbnail and preview generation
